intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 75% FTP, Seated. 15:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 200% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:15 at 200%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/6. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 15s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:15 at 200%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 50%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 50% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 50% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/6. 0:15 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/6. 200% FTP, Standing. 15s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 200%, 110-130 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/6. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 50%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 50%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 50% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/6. 15s at 200%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 200% for 15s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 3/6. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 15s. Standing, 60-75 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 50%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 50% × 5:00. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 50%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 25 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 50%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 200%, 110-130 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 59% done. 2 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 59% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/6. Power: 170-200%, Cadence: 110-130 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% done. 0 intervals left. 15 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 1min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/6. 36 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5 of 6. Target: 200% FTP, 60-75 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 5/6. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 69% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 69% into session. 200%, 60-75 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 36 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 10 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/6. 80% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 15s. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 15s. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 15s. Standing, 110-130 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 80% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 1min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 80% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
